finding: Skilled staff shortages overtake costs as Slovak firms' top concern
bullets: Skilled staff availability ranked most pressing among the seven problems tested, scoring 6.64/10 (n=239), rising from 6.07 in Wave 38 — the largest increase across all categories, signalling heightened urgency for firms.
Costs of production or labour scored 6.62/10 (n=240), up from 6.19 in Wave 38, broadly in line with the euro area average of 6.74 — underscoring persistent cost pressures despite lower ranking.
Regulation scored 6.10/10 (n=236), easing marginally from 6.18 in the prior wave; access to finance remained below 5/10 and thus not a pressing concern.
chart_subtitle: Skilled staff tops Slovak concerns at 6.64/10.
